fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Wyoming Pharmacy Technician License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a pharmacy technician? Here's whether your license transfers to Wyoming - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: pharmacy technician license reciprocity wyoming, how to transfer pharmacy technician license to wyoming, pharmacy technician compact wyoming, wyoming pharmacy technician endorsement application

board.name: Wyoming Board of Pharmacy
board.mailing_address: Wyoming Board of Pharmacy, 1800 Carey Ave. 4th Floor, Cheyenne, WY 82002

license_types.title: Certified Pharmacy Technician (CPhT)
license_types.description: The standard credential to practice as a pharmacy technician in Wyoming.

steps.title: 1. Register an Account on eLicense Wyoming
steps.description: Navigate to the eLicense Wyoming portal at https://www.elicense.state.wy.us/. Click on 'Register a New User Account' in the top right corner and follow the instructions to create your personal account using a valid email address.

steps.title: 2. Start a New Pharmacy Technician Application
steps.description: Log in to your newly created eLicense Wyoming account. From your dashboard, select the 'New Application' option and choose 'Pharmacy Technician' from the list of available application types. Begin filling out the online application form.

steps.title: 3. Complete Application and Obtain Pharmacist-in-Charge Attestation
steps.description: Fill out all sections of the online application, providing personal details, education history (minimum high school diploma or equivalent), and consent to a criminal history background check. Crucially, your application requires an attestation of employment from a Wyoming licensed Pharmacist-in-Charge (PIC) indicating that you will receive on-the-job training in a Wyoming licensed pharmacy. Ensure this attestation is completed within the portal or submitted as directed.

steps.title: 4. Submit Application and Pay Fee
steps.description: Review your completed application for accuracy and completeness. Electronically submit any required supporting documents. Pay the non-refundable application fee of $50.00 directly through the eLicense Wyoming portal using an accepted payment method.

steps.title: 5. Complete Criminal History Background Check
steps.description: Follow the Board's instructions to complete the required criminal history background check. This typically involves fingerprinting and submitting them to the appropriate state and federal agencies (e.g., Wyoming Department of Criminal Investigation and the FBI). The Board will provide guidance on this process after your application submission.

steps.title: 6. Board Review and Licensure
steps.description: Monitor the status of your application through your eLicense Wyoming account. The Wyoming Board of Pharmacy will review your complete application, the PIC attestation, and the results of your background check. Upon satisfactory review and approval, your Pharmacy Technician license will be issued.

documents.detail: Sent directly from your educational institution.
Official verification of passing the PTCB (Pharmacy Technician Certification Board) or ExCPT exam.

provisional_text: Wyoming offers a temporary or trainee pharmacy technician permit that allows new applicants to begin working in a pharmacy setting under direct pharmacist supervision while completing their certification requirements. Contact the Wyoming Board of Pharmacy for specific temporary permit restrictions and duration.
reciprocity_text: Pharmacy technicians registered in another state may apply for registration in Wyoming by submitting a new application to the Wyoming Board of Pharmacy. There is no interstate compact for pharmacy technicians. Applicants must provide proof of current national certification (PTCB or ExCPT), complete any Wyoming-specific requirements, and pass a criminal background check. Processing typically takes 1 to 2 Weeks.

faqs.question: How much does a Wyoming pharmacy technician license cost?
faqs.answer: The initial application and licensing fee varies, often around $100 to $200. Check the specific fee breakdown above.

faqs.question: Is national certification required?
faqs.answer: Yes, passing the PTCB (Pharmacy Technician Certification Board) or ExCPT exam is a standard requirement for initial licensure across almost all states.

faqs.question: Does Wyoming have reciprocity for pharmacy technicians?
faqs.answer: No interstate compact currently covers pharmacy technician practice in Wyoming. To work in Wyoming, apply for licensure by endorsement through the state board.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my pharmacy technician license to Wyoming?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 4 to 6 Weeks.

faqs.question: Can I start working in Wyoming while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Pharmacy technicians registered in another state may apply for registration in Wyoming by submitting a new application to the Wyoming Board of Pharmacy. There is no interstate compact for pharmacy technicians. Applicants must provide proof of current national certification (PTCB or ExCPT), complete any Wyoming-specific requirements, and pass a criminal background check. Processing typically takes 1 to 2 Weeks.

hero.title: Become a Pharmacy Technician in Wyoming
hero.dek: Apply online through Wyoming's eLicense portal (elicense.state.wy.us). Create an account, select 'New Application' for Pharmacy Technician, and submit your application along with required attestations and background check consent.
